evidence.claim: [PSMD13] 26S proteasome regulatory subunit (Rpn9) — VERDICT: WORSENING - pan-essential proteasome component. PSMD13 (Rpn9) is a pan-essential 26S proteasome subunit; mTORC1 hyperactivation already stresses proteostasis, so PSMD13 knockdown worsens proteostatic collapse rather than rescuing.
